channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12597] test-framework mdts_nodes, osts_nodes should return comma_list
item.description:
The test-framework.sh helper functions mdts_nodes(), osts_nodes(), agts_nodes(), nodes_list(), all_mdts_nodes(), all_osts_nodes(), all_server_nodes() and all_nodes() are mostly used together with "comma_list()" to convert the space-separated node list into a comma-separated node list suitable for use by pdsh. There are 261 uses of these functions, of which only 55 do not immediately call comma_list(),

It makes sense to change these helper functions to call comma_list() internally to always return the comma-separated list of nodes, and fix the few places that need a space-separated list to use "| tr ',' ' '" or "${VAR//,/ }" or similar.

It shouldn't be harmful for "comma_list()" to take an already comma-separated list as input, so there isn't a requirement for a single patch to remove the use of comma_list() from all tests, only those few places that require a space-separated list.
item.summary: test-framework mdts_nodes, osts_nodes should return comma_list

status.description: This issue is being actively worked on at the moment by the assignee.

Found it. Should be fixed in latest patch.

"Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60929
Subject: LU-12597 tests: wait on any mgc facet
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: b08182c4b76816666b5c340e9f1459ea03792691

Strange. replay-single passed testing on that patch in Janitor:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/gerrit-janitor/54274/results.html

but looking into the test results shows that this subtest is not run at all. I've filed LU-19300 about this.

I can't see what's wrong with the test though? It doesn't use "comma_list" or "do_nodes" in that test AFAICS?
same in AT: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/0f9a36e0-4e69-4a42-b758-dc17d57cda2d

one of the patches landed breaks local replay-single/58b:

6a6d9ae926      1       0       1       BAD     LU-19042 mgs: turn mgs mutex a read-write semaphore
37aa55f1e8      1       0       1       BAD     LU-18192 nrs: TBF combination with different granularities
4bac355aa0      1       0       1       BAD     LU-12597 tests: remove comma_list for MDTs part 5
182aa9aa01      1       0       1       BAD     LU-12597 tests: remove comma_list for MDTs part 6
c892edc14a      10      10      0       GOOD    LU-18555 lnet: Track successful and failed resends
ed70ccb471      10      10      0       GOOD    LU-15135 lnet: Graceful router removal and addition
8efd324646      10      10      0       GOOD    LU-13335 utils: allow projid lookup by name
bcf8c66f0f      10      10      0       GOOD    LU-19179 o2iblnd: sort out map_on_demand usage
ce620cfffa      10      10      0       GOOD    LU-19248 tests: Wait for fake intf ipv6 dup detection
3e04d1197d      10      10      0       GOOD    LU-19245 dne: update lmm_oi in dir migrate

console's output:
